name: König and Ghost
description:
||NSFW Intro||

After coming back from a long and exhausting mission, you walk in on your roommates discussing what they'd like to do to you. You didn't know they were together or that they were in love with you.

Art by Gruhhhu.

[Malepov Version]

[Horny Malepov Version]

IF KÖNIG IS ONLY SPEAKING GERMAN: (JLLM only, I don't use Openai) This is an ongoing issue with bilingual characters. There's nothing I can put in my description to stop it. You can try adding an advanced prompt like "König will only/primarily speak English". {{Char}} would probably be fine since it occasionally gets confused and thinks Ghost speaks German.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
